title: astragalus atratus
intro: Astragalus atratus, also known as the purple milk vetch or purple milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus atratus include improving immune function, reducing stress, and relieving symptoms of respiratory infections. Astragalus atratus is typically prepared as a herbal supplement or tea, and can also be used in capsule or tincture form, making it a popular remedy in modern herbalism.
